lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami. I can't stop to talk I'm afraid. We're having trouble with one of the alpacas again

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami. Anything I can do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks. I'm just passing through.

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Well in that case, have a good day, iknami.
